title: UPDATE does not work with DECLEAREd TABLE in FUNCTION
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table (id INTEGER, value TEXT);
UPDATE temp_table SET value = 'new_value' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (SELECT value FROM temp_table WHERE id = 1) AS updated_value;
key_bug_features: UPDATE on DECLAREd TABLE in FUNCTION fails
